title: Citrusy Silky Norwegian Christmas Pudding Trifle
description: A romantic and creamy dessert featuring steamed Christmas pudding, sautéed citrus, and a silky custard sauce, all layered in a delicate Norwegian-inspired trifle.
instructions: Steam the Christmas pudding according to package instructions.
In a medium saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the orange zest and grapefruit juice to the saucepan and sauté for 1-2 minutes.
In a large bowl, whisk together the heavy cream, granulated sugar, egg yolks, vanilla extract, and salt.
Gradually add the warm cream mixture to the egg yolk mixture, whisking constantly.
Pour the custard mixture into a clean saucepan and cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens.
Strain the custard mixture into a clean bowl and let cool to room temperature.
To assemble the trifle, place a layer of Christmas pudding in the bottom of a large serving dish.
Top the pudding with a layer of the sautéed citrus mixture, followed by a layer of the cooled custard mixture.
Repeat the layers one more time, ending with a layer of custard on top.
Sprinkle the candied citrus peel over the top of the trifle and serve chilled.
